The AI explicitly states this claim is not supported by solid, credible evidence, directly identifying it as false. It provides a detailed rebuttal with examples of real-world power dynamics and historical cases, explaining why the idea of a single unified secret control is implausible. The AI also acknowledges some influence by elites but clarifies this does not equate to total control, thus challenging the misinformation while validating the complexity of power structures without endorsing the conspiracy.
